scripts.setup: [ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" ] || { echo 'Missing .env.local in repo root — copy .env.example and fill in values'; exit 1; } && npm install && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" .env.local && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.sentry-build-plugin" .env.sentry-build-plugin
scripts.run: trap 'kill 0' SIGTERM SIGINT; npx convex dev & npm run dev -- --port $CONDUCTOR_PORT & wait
